arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool set for imminent FIFA rule decision that could change transfers forever

arts.ttl: Slot on Liverpool: 'We cannot accept mediocrity'
arts.sum: Arne Slot has said he will not accept "mediocrity " at Liverpool as they look to build on their encouraging start to his first season in charge.

arts.ttl: New Liverpool signing will MISS Champions League clash with Bologna after injury setback - as Arne Slot learns Diogo Jota's fate after fitness concern during win over Wolves
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Federico Chiesa will miss the Champions League clash with Bologna after sustaining a minor issue in training.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot issues demand to Liverpool stars ahead of Anfield Champions League bow
arts.sum: Liverpool face their first Champions League home game of the season on Wednesday evening as they take on Italian side Bologna at Anfield and Arne Slot has sent a strong message to his stars

arts.sum: Liverpool are currently sitting pretty at the top of the Premier League, but they’re not seen by many as one of the favourites for the...

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury update on Jota and Chiesa ahead of Champions League tie
arts.sum: There is good and bad news for Liverpool on the injury front as Arne Slot delivered an update on Diogo Jota and Federico Chiesa. The Reds are preparing for their first home game of this season’s Uefa Champions League as they welcome Bologna to Anfield on Wednesday night, with kick off set for 8pm BST. […] The post Liverpool injury update on Jota and Chiesa ahead of Champions League tie first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot urges Liverpool stars to prove why Champions League 'missed us' as Reds look to continue winning form in Europe against Serie A side Bologna
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Arne Slot challenged Liverpool's players and fans to show the rest of Europe why their Champions League absence last season was a blow for the whole continent.

arts.ttl: MAN UTD CONFIDENTIAL: Erik ten Hag's dressing-room praise for players after Tottenham humbling, Brailsford and Co's post-match summit, Liverpool poised to hijack £70m move for centre back
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER AND NATHAN SALT: Ten Hag could have been forgiven for tearing into his team after the defeat plunged him back into crisis and cast fresh doubt over his future at the club.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice makes shock Liverpool admission ahead of Champions League return to Anfield
arts.sum: Declan Rice believes Anfield is the away ground with the best atmosphere in the Champions League
